claim_text: NVIDIA and Coherent announced a multiyear strategic agreement covering advanced optics technologies including manufacturing capacity and R&D, with a multibillion-dollar purchase commitment, future access and capacity rights, and a $2B NVIDIA investment in Coherent.
notes: Primary handoff source; validates roadmap/customer pull but not future margins.

claim_text: NVIDIA says optical interconnects and advanced package integration are foundational to AI infrastructure and that the Coherent agreement supports R&D, capacity and U.S.-based manufacturing.
notes: NVIDIA-side confirmation of the same agreement.

claim_text: COHR reported Q3 FY2026 revenue of $1.806B, up 20.5% YoY; non-GAAP gross margin of 39.6%; Datacenter & Communications revenue of $1.362B; and Q4 revenue guidance of $1.91B-$2.05B.
COHR reported FY2026 YTD operating cash flow of $10.1M and property, plant and equipment additions of $547.2M.

COHR's Q3 FY2026 presentation says the 6-inch platform is producing EMLs, CW lasers and photodiodes with higher yields than 3-inch lines, and references multiple CPO architectures, silicon photonics, InP and VCSEL.
notes: Direct match to external-laser / InP bottleneck ladder.

claim_text: COHR's Q3 FY2026 presentation frames transceivers, DCI, optical circuit switch, optical components, multi-rail, thermal solutions and CPO/NPO as growth engines and indicates CPO/NPO timing in H2 2026.
notes: Forward-looking company roadmap; needs revenue conversion.

claim_text: StockAnalysis reported COHR market cap around $74B in late May 2026.
notes: Third-party market data used only for valuation-burden context; refresh before live use.

claim_text: The prior Mira COHR earnings case concluded thesis impact +1, citing strong AI optical growth but weak cash conversion and a cleaner LITE relative growth/margin benchmark.
notes: Internal derived source with upstream evidence in legacy schema.

claim_text: The CPO bottleneck recursion trial ranked external lasers and InP laser manufacturing as the first validation path for public-company handoff.
notes: Derived method output; not standalone evidence.
